descript.abstract: The Watershed Condition Classification feature class represents data on Watershed Condition on Forest Service lands in HUC12 (from the Watershed Boundary Dataset) watersheds that contain more than 5% USFS ownership. The feature class also includes data on high priority watersheds identified in the Watershed Condition Framework (WCF) process. The WCF data identifies priority watersheds, rationale for their designation as such, and information on Watershed Restoration Action Plans. The data are compiled from the Watershed Condition Assessment and Tracking Tool (WCATT) application within the NRM (National Resource Manager: a suite of applications, each of which collects, stores and reports data for various Forest Service business areas).
descript.purpose: The Watershed Condition Class feature class supports a webservice; that supports the Watershed Classification and Assesment Tracking Tool (WCAAT) map viewer. The WCAAT map viewer is a public-facing interactive map application using Silverlight technology. This dataset is primarily designed to give public users of the WCATT map viewer access to PDF documents (Watershed Restoration Action Plans and Accomplishment Reports) documenting restoration efforts in selected priority watersheds.
descript.supplinf: The feature class includes a join of data in the FS_NRIS_WCATT.COND_WTRSHD (MCI) table with watershed features in the S_USA.WBD_HU12 (EDW) feature class.

idinfo.useconst: The USDA Forest Service makes no warranty, expressed or implied, including the warranties of merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose, nor assumes any legal liability or responsibility for the accuracy, reliability, completeness or utility of these geospatial data, or for the improper or incorrect use of these geospatial data. These geospatial data and related maps or graphics are not legal documents and are not intended to be used as such. The data and maps may not be used to determine title, ownership, legal descriptions or boundaries, legal jurisdiction, or restrictions that may be in place on either public or private land. Natural hazards may or may not be depicted on the data and maps, and users should exercise due caution. The data are dynamic and may change over time. The user is responsible to verify the limitations of the geospatial data and to use the data accordingly

cntorgp.cntorg: USFS Chief Information Office, Enterprise Data Warehouse

cntinfo.cntvoice: Please send an e-mail to the address below.

idinfo.datacred: Brian Sanborn, USDA FS Natural Resource Manager, Data Steward

dataqual.logic: Data entry is accomplished by authorized Forest Service personnel through a web application behind the U.S. Forest Service firewall and is restricted by access requirement protocols.
dataqual.complete: Data is complete as of publication.

horizpa.horizpar: Generally the source information used to record spatial locations are from: 1) on-screen digitizing with a georeferenced topographic or image background; or 2) GPS field collected positions. Horizontal accuracy is variable.

procstep.procdesc: This dataset was produced from NRM (National Resource Manager), a suite of applications, each of which collects, stores and reports data for various Forest Service business areas.

enttyp.enttypd: A collection of geographic features with the same geometry type (such as point, line, or polygon), the same attributes, and the same spatial reference.

attr.attrdef: Condition rating for aquatic biota indicator.

attrdomv.udom: See condition rating rule set in the USDA Watershed Condition Classification Technical Guide located at https://www.fs.usda.gov/biology/resources/pubs/watershed/maps/watershed_classification_guide2011FS978.pdf.

attr.attrdef: Acres within a watershed that are owned by USFS as calculated from the national AdministrativeForest feature class.

attrdomv.udom: Number of acres of Forest Service Ownership within the watershed.

attr.attrdef: Percent Non Forest Service ownership in watershed
Condition rating for the fire effects and fire regime indicator

attrdomv.udom: See condition rating rule set in the USDA Watershed Condition Classification Technical Guide.

attr.attrdef: The organization number for the Forest Service unit that stewards the data.

attrdomv.udom: The numerical code of the US Forest that administers the land, i.e., Administrative Forest ID.

attr.attrdef: Condition rating for the aquatic habitat indicator

attrdomv.udom: See condition rating rule set in the USDA Watershed Condition Classification Technical Guide.

attr.attrdef: Feature geometry.
The number of essential projects identified in the watershed restoration action plan.
The PDF of the Watershed Restoration Action Plan

edom.edomvd: Data stored in the geodatabase as a long sequence of binary numbers.

attr.attrdef: Estimated completion date of the Watershed Restoration Action Plan
The PDF of the Watershed Accomplish Report

edom.edomvd: Data stored in the geodatabase as a long sequence of binary numbers.

attr.attrdef: Known partners participating in the Watershed Restoration Action Plan
Internally generated attribute for publishing
Condition rating for the rangeland vegetation indicator

attrdomv.udom: See condition rating rule set in the USDA Watershed Condition Classification Technical Guide.

attr.attrdef: The date the Watershed Restoration Action Plan was approved.
The actual date the Watershed Restoration Action Plan was completed
The estimated cost to complete the essential projects
Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Length of feature in internal units.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: The year the WRAP was completed.
Condition rating for the invasive species indicator

attrdomv.udom: See condition rating rule set in the USDA Watershed Condition Classification Technical Guide.

attr.attrdef: Indicator for the existence of a Watershed Accomplish Report
Condition rating for the forest health indicator

attrdomv.udom: See condition rating rule set in the USDA Watershed Condition Classification Technical Guide.

attr.attrdef: Condition rating for the forest cover indicator

attrdomv.udom: See condition rating rule set in the USDA Watershed Condition Classification Technical Guide.

attr.attrdef: Year the watershed was designated as a WCF priority
The principal reasons the watershed was designated as a WCF priority
Condition rating for the roads and trails indicator

attrdomv.udom: See condition rating rule set in the USDA Watershed Condition Classification Technical Guide.

attr.attrdef: Condition rating for the water quantity indicator

attrdomv.udom: See condition rating rule set in the USDA Watershed Condition Classification Technical Guide.

attr.attrdef: Total area of watershed
Name of watershed

The watersheds from the nationally consistent watershed dataset that is subdivided into 6 levels (12-digit Hydrologic Unit Codes (HUC)) and is available from the USGS and USDA NRCS. The Watershed Boundary Dataset (WBD) contains the most current, the highest resolution and the most detailed delineation of the watershed boundaries.
Condition rating for the soils condition indicator

attrdomv.udom: See condition rating rule set in the USDA Watershed Condition Classification Technical Guide.

attr.attrdef: Internal feature number.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Condition rating for the water quality indicator

attrdomv.udom: See condition rating rule set in the USDA Watershed Condition Classification Technical Guide.

attr.attrdef: Condition rating for the riparian and wetland vegetation indicator

attrdomv.udom: See condition rating rule set in the USDA Watershed Condition Classification Technical Guide.

attr.attrdef: Name of primary forest in watershed. Forests are subdivisions of regions and can be found on https://www.fs.usda.gov/organization.
Condition of watershed on Forest Service lands
Approval date of the Watershed Restoration Action Plan
Percent Forest Service ownership in watershed
Watershed Restoration Action Plan Name

attrdomv.udom: Fiscal year and name of plan

attr.attrdef: Indicator for the existence of a Watershed Restoration Action Plan
Narrative reasons the watershed was designated as a WCF priority

distinfo.distliab: The U.S. Forest Service makes no warranty, express or implied, nor assumes any liability or responsibility for the accuracy, reliability, completeness, or utility of these geospatial data or for the improper or incorrect use of those data. The data are dynamic and may change over time. The user is responsible for verifying the limitations of the geospatial data and for using the data accordingly.
